infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AI Tour Guide uses the camera to scan landmarks and provide contextual guidance.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AI Tour Guide uses your location to suggest nearby landmarks.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AI Tour Guide to scan landmarks with your camera.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow AI Tour Guide to find landmarks near you.
